---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# excluding_classicalshadow

## purity

```{julia}
using RandomMeas
# product group
siteindices = siteinds("Qubit",4);
measurement_group = import_MeasurementGroup("./03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/04_workflow/b_data_acquisition/group.npz", site_indices=siteindices);
# calculate purity
get_purity(measurement_group)
```
